TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1974 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. qnxan nya Dan Anderson NBA wal wayan mhngaw lga,śąźÁāļ tmngasal na squilq ru mtzyaw qhoniq na squilq.qutux qutux kawas tmngasal qutux pgal ťĖď. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *an an*ers~…ēon s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®ali*ornia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu portlan* trail ő≤lazers~…ē. qnxan nja *an an*ers~…ēon nő≤a wal wajan mńßŇčaw l…£a,** tmŇčas~…ēal na s~…ēquilq ru mtzjaw qńßoniq na s~…ēquilq.qutux qutux kawas~…ē tmŇčas~…ēal qutux p…£al *. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Dan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1974 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. qnxan nya Dan Anderson NBA wal wayan mhngaw lga,śąźÁāļ tmngasal na squilq ru mtzyaw qhoniq na squilq.qutux qutux kawas tmngasal qutux pgal ťĖď. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *an an*ers~…ēon s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®ali*ornia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu portlan* trail ő≤lazers~…ē. qnxan nja *an an*ers~…ēon nő≤a wal wajan mńßŇčaw l…£a,** tmŇčas~…ēal na s~…ēquilq ru mtzjaw qńßoniq na s~…ēquilq.qutux qutux kawas~…ē tmŇčas~…ēal qutux p…£al *. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
